mapper.select: SELECT id, category FROM institution_master WHERE company_code = #{companyCode} AND is_active = TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO linked_institutions (user_id, institution_master_id, link_status, linked_at, last_synced_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{institutionMasterId}, #{linkStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE linked_institutions SET link_status = 'LINKED', linked_at = NOW(), last_synced_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND link_status <> 'LINKED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO linked_bank_accounts (user_id, institution_id, account_type, account_name, balance, currency, is_dormant, is_verified, last_synced_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{institutionId}, #{accountType}, #{accountName}, #{balance}, #{currency}, FALSE, FALSE, NOW())
INSERT INTO linked_cards (user_id, institution_id, card_name, card_type, masked_no, last_synced_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{institutionId}, #{cardName}, #{cardType}, #{maskedNo}, NOW())
INSERT INTO linked_points (user_id, institution_id, point_name, balance, last_synced_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{institutionId}, #{pointName}, #{balance}, NOW())
INSERT INTO linked_securities (user_id, institution_id, deposit_cash, currency, last_synced_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{institutionId}, #{depositCash}, #{currency}, NOW())

INSERT INTO external_holdings (user_id, institution_id, stock_code, stock_name, quantity, eval_amount, synced_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{institutionId}, #{stockCode}, #{stockName}, #{quantity}, #{evalAmount}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id AS accountId, balance FROM linked_bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId} AND closed_at IS NULL ORDER BY (currency = 'KRW') DESC, balance DESC, id ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM linked_cards WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM external_holdings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId}
SELECT balance FROM linked_bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND institution_id = #{institutionId} AND currency = 'USD' AND closed_at IS NULL ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
